problem: How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage?
mechanism: Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area
hypothesis: The key to How does central sensitization maintain chronic pain without tissue damage? is Transcranial magnetic stimulation of specific cortical area — specifically Transcranial magnetic stimulation — which would help 50,000,000 people affected.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: What we observe is not nature itself but nature exposed to our method of questioning. — Heisenberg
